Name: postgis_locations
SQL: SELECT coalesce(json_agg("_root"), '[]') AS "_root" FROM (WITH "_root.base" AS (SELECT * FROM "public"."postgis_locations" WHERE (ST_3DDWithin("public"."postgis_locations"."geom", ST_GeomFromGeoJSON($1), $2) OR ST_3DIntersects("public"."postgis_locations"."geom", ST_GeomFromGeoJSON($3)) OR ST_Crosses("public"."postgis_locations"."geom", ST_GeomFromGeoJSON($4)) OR ST_Overlaps("public"."postgis_locations"."area", ST_GeomFromGeoJSON($5)) OR ST_Touches("public"."postgis_locations"."area", ST_GeomFromGeoJSON($6)) OR ST_Within("public"."postgis_locations"."geom", ST_GeomFromGeoJSON($7))) ORDER BY "name" ASC) SELECT row_to_json((SELECT "_e" FROM (SELECT "_root.base"."name" AS "name") AS "_e")) AS "_root" FROM "_root.base") AS "_root"
